surface_verification.justification: Plugin-side prompt documentation + drift-protection meta-tests across shipwright-iterate and shipwright-project skills; no startable web/CLI/API app surface is affected. Verification is the two plugins' full pytest suites (258 + 59 passed) incl. reference-link drift tests pinning the new F-debug.md link and both Kerns <=300 LOC. Behavioral acceptance (live bug-routing / assumptions-first) is prompt-execution, covered structurally by the new tests.

degraded.detail: Autonomous run; external LLM review (medium+ auto) skipped — no API keys available and the change is documentation + meta-tests only. Self-review + drift-protection suites stand in.

Full unit suite scoped to the two touched plugins (shipwright-iterate 258, shipwright-project 59 = 317). Monorepo-wide shared/tests + integration-tests were not re-run because no shared/* or integration code changed; the touched files are markdown prompts + two plugin meta-tests.
